headline: Linde Expands North Carolina Footprint With New Air Separation Facility
summary: Linde (NasdaqGS:LIN) announced plans to build, own, and operate a new air separation facility in North Carolina. The project will produce liquid oxygen, nitrogen, and argon to support customers across the region. The expansion reflects Linde's intention to increase industrial gas production capacity in North America. Linde is a large industrial gases company, and the new North Carolina facility adds to its network supplying products used in sectors such as healthcare, manufacturing, and...
